message:
fix(search-core,db,core,storage): fix compilation errors and resolve 17+ clippy lints

search-core: Wrap fast_embedder in Option<Arc<>> at all 15 call sites and
handle None in iterator (fixes breakage from 866b6bd2), add #[must_use].
db: Unnest or-patterns in s3fifo, convert match to let-else in cache,
fix ignored unit pattern in pool.
core: Collapse nested if in pattern_overlap.
storage: Collapse nested if in git lock cleanup.
docs: Update DUAL_MODE_ROLLOUT_PLAYBOOK.md for native e2e command.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -81,7 +81,7 @@ Use `docs/RELEASE_CHECKLIST.md` as the canonical sign-off ledger.
   ```
 - [ ] E2E dual-mode: 84+ assertions pass
   ```bash
-  bash scripts/e2e_dual_mode.sh
+  am e2e run --project . dual_mode
   ```
 - [ ] Help snapshots match golden fixtures
